mapper.select: SELECT task_id, project_id, parent_task_id, task_title FROM schedule_task WHERE task_id = #{task_id}
SELECT project_id, project_type_code, project_name FROM schedule_project WHERE project_id = #{project_id}
SELECT task_id, project_id, parent_task_id, task_title FROM schedule_task WHERE project_id = #{project_id}
mapper.update: SELECT setval( pg_get_serial_sequence('schedule_task', 'task_id'), COALESCE((SELECT MAX(task_id) FROM schedule_task), 0) + 1, false )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule_task ( project_id, parent_task_id, task_type_code, task_title, task_status, priority, assignee_user_id, start_date, due_date, actual_start_date, actual_end_date, task_url, support_amount, actual_amount, progress_rate, description ) VALUES ( #{project_id}, #{parent_task_id}, #{task_type_code}, #{task_title}, #{task_status}, #{priority}, #{assignee_user_id}, CAST(#{start_date} AS DATE), CAST(#{due_date} AS DATE), CAST(#{actual_start_date} AS DATE), CAST(#{actual_end_date} AS DATE), #{task_url}, #{support_amount}, #{actual_amount}, #{progress_rate}, #{description} )
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule_task SET project_id = #{project_id}, parent_task_id = #{parent_task_id}, task_type_code = #{task_type_code}, task_title = #{task_title}, task_status = #{task_status}, priority = #{priority}, assignee_user_id = #{assignee_user_id}, start_date = CAST(#{start_date} AS DATE), due_date = CAST(#{due_date} AS DATE), actual_start_date = CAST(#{actual_start_date} AS DATE), actual_end_date = CAST(#{actual_end_date} AS DATE), task_url = #{task_url}, support_amount = #{support_amount}, actual_amount = #{actual_amount}, progress_rate = #{progress_rate}, description = #{description}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE task_id = #{task_id}
